# askhermie.dev

> Practical AI-agent, automation, systems engineering, cybersecurity, IoT, firmware, and hardware-lab resource map with plain-English notes and copy/paste install commands.

## Key pages

- Home: https://askhermie.dev/
- Resource map: https://askhermie.dev/resources/
- About: https://askhermie.dev/about/
- Sitemap: https://askhermie.dev/sitemap.xml

## Main topics

- Hermes Agent resources
- AI agent tools and MCP servers
- Local AI tools
- Automation workflows
- Cybersecurity learning labs
- IoT, ESP32, Raspberry Pi, firmware, and hardware tools
- Homelab monitoring and systems engineering utilities
- Beginner-friendly install commands and first-use examples
